name: hig-project-context
description: >- Create or update a shared Apple design context document that other HIG skills use to tailor guidance. Use when the user says "set up my project context," "what platforms am I targeting," "configure HIG settings," or when starting a new Apple platform project. Also activates when other HIG skills need project context but none exists yet. This skill creates .claude/apple-design-context.md so that hig-foundations, hig-platforms, hig-components-*, hig-inputs, and hig-technologies can provide targ
author: raintree-technology
summary_zh: 用来生成或更新苹果设计规范的项目上下文文档，记录目标平台、设备类型等信息，让其他 HIG 相关工具据此给出更贴合当前项目的设计建议，适合启动新苹果平台项目时统一配置。
